title: The Silmarillion
author: J. R. R. Tolkien
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "The Silmarillion" book by J. R. R. Tolkien?
Options:
A. Although you are welcome to remain, you cannot leave my kingdom because my law forbids any who come here to depart, the being declared. However, El withdrew his hand and rejected its law, saying it and its kin had no right to seize lands or set boundaries here or anywhere else. This is the land of the Teleri, to which you bring war and turmoil, acting with arrogance and injustice. I did not come to uncover your secrets but to take back what is rightfully mine - my wife and son.
B. You may stay here if you wish, but you cannot leave my realm, for my law dictates that none who find their way here can depart, said the being. But El refused to obey, saying that neither this being nor its kin had any right to claim these lands or set borders here or anywhere. This is the land of the Teleri, to which you bring war and unrest, always acting arrogantly and unfairly. I do not care about your secrets - I came not to spy but to reclaim what is mine: my wife and son.
C. Here you shall dwell at your pleasure, save only that you must here abide and depart not from my kingdom; for it is my law that none who finds the way hither shall depart.' But El withdrew his hand. 'I acknowledge not your law,' he said. 'No right have you or any of your kin in this land to seize realms or to set bounds, either here or there. This is the land of the Teleri, to which you bring war and all unquiet, dealing ever proudly and unjustly. I care nothing for your secrets and I came not to spy upon you, but to claim my own: my wife and my son.
D. You can stay here if you want, but you can't leave my realm because my law says no one who finds their way here can depart, said the being. But El pulled back his hand, refusing to acknowledge its law. You and your kin have no right to take these lands or set borders here or anywhere, he said. This is the land of the Teleri, to which you bring war and unrest, always acting proud and unfair. I don't care about your secrets - I came not to spy but to reclaim what's mine: my wife and my son.
